name: toggle-demo
visual_summary: A toggle switch component that can be used to enable or disable a feature on/off state. Developers can use this component when they need to provide users with an easy toggling mechanism. It is commonly used in preference settings or to manage feature toggles.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: toggle-demo
Description: A toggle switch component that can be used to enable or disable a feature on/off state. Developers can use this component when they need to provide users with an easy toggling mechanism. It is commonly used in preference settings or to manage feature toggles.
Style: default, rounded, filled
Interactions: animated, clickable, hover
Tags: toggle, switch, preferences, settings

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
